title: Iran’s Prince Reza Pahlavi to speak at CPAC
author: Sarah Davis
fullText: The exiled Iranian Prince Reza Pahlavi is set to appear at the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) in Texas later this month, the group announced on Tuesday.  Pahlavi has pitched himself as an interim leader for the country after Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed Saturday during joint U.S.-Israeli strikes on the country. …
summary: The exiled Iranian Prince Reza Pahlavi is set to appear at the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) in Texas later this month, the group announced on Tuesday.  Pahlavi has pitched himself as an interim leader for the country after Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed Saturday during joint U.S.-Israeli strikes on the country. …
